caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold across the chest, and a gold chain is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him and headphones over his ears. To his left, a white backdrop features the phrase "UNICORN HUSTLE" repeated multiple times, each accompanied by five gold stars. Above him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black device and a can with red and blue text are visible on the table. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, and his facial expression shifts from a neutral, focused look to a slight smile as he continues to talk. A small logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK" is visible in the bottom left of the scene.
